# Mock Jutsu

> Open-source synthetic test data generator for developers. 395+ data types across banking, identity, payments, fintech, health, crypto, IoT, and more. Zero external dependencies. Available as CLI tool, Python library, and self-hosted REST API.

## What It Does

Mock Jutsu generates realistic, format-valid synthetic data for software testing, QA automation, demos, and development. All generated values are fully synthetic and safe to use in non-production environments.

Key features:
- 395+ data types across 40+ categories
- Locale-aware generation (TR, US, UK, DE, FR, RU)
- Regulation-compliant masked output (PCI DSS, GDPR, KVKK)
- Bulk generation, template mode, export to JSON/CSV/SQL
- Checksum-valid output: IBAN (MOD-97), Luhn (cards), TCKN, BIC, CUSIP, ISIN, and more

## Installation

pip install mock-jutsu
docker pull altansayan/mock-jutsu-api

## CLI Usage

jutsu generate iban --locale TR
jutsu generate cardnum --locale US
jutsu bulk tckn --count 10
jutsu template --types '["iban","fullname","phone"]' --count 5
jutsu generate iban --locale TR --mask true

## Python Usage

from mockjutsu.cli import jutsu
jutsu.generate("iban", locale="TR")
jutsu.generate("tckn")
jutsu.generate("cardnum", locale="US", mask=True)

## REST API Usage

GET /generate/iban?locale=TR
GET /bulk/cardnum?count=10&locale=US
POST /template  {"types":["iban","fullname","phone"],"count":5}
GET /generate/iban?locale=TR&mask=true

## Data Categories

### Banking (24 types)
iban, bic, swift_code, creditor_ref, account_number, routing_number, sort_code, account_type, transaction_type, ifsc_code, bsb_code, bank_name, aba_routing, clabe, cnaps, fps_code, nsc_code, rtn, bank_id, transit_number, bban, rib

### Financial / Cards (22 types)
cardnum, cardtype, cardstatus, cardcategory, cardowner, cvv3, cvv4, pin, expiry, expirymonth, expiryyear, issuer, iban_masked, pan_masked, account_masked, card_masked, cvv_masked, track1_masked, track2_masked, chip_masked, pin_masked, full_card_masked

### Identity Turkey (8 types)
tckn, ykn, nationalid, vkn, taxid, employer_id, duns, mersis

### Identity International (49 types)
ssn (USA), nin (UK), sin (Canada), inn (Russia), snils (Russia), nhs_number (UK), br_cpf, br_cnpj, in_pan, in_aadhaar, in_gstin, za_id, au_tfn, au_abn, mx_rfc, mx_curp, pl_pesel, pl_nip, no_fnr, se_pnr, fi_hetu, dk_cpr, nl_bsn, be_nn, at_svnr, ch_ahv, es_nif, it_cf, pt_nif, gr_amka, hu_taj, cz_rc, sk_rc, ro_cnp, bg_egn, hr_oib, rs_jmbg, ua_ipn, kz_iin, ge_pn, il_id, sa_id, eg_id, pk_cnic, ph_sss

### Capital Markets and Trading (20 types)
isin, cusip, sedol, lei, figi, fix_message, psd2_consent, order_id_fix, execution_report, market_order, limit_order, stop_order, trade_confirmation, settlement_instruction, corporate_action, dividend_notice, proxy_vote, rights_issue, bond_prospectus, fund_nav

### Compliance and AML (17 types)
policy_number, claim_number, pep_status, aml_risk_rating, cdd_level, sar_number, kyc_status, fatf_risk, sanctions_list, ubo_structure, risk_score, compliance_flag, audit_trail, regulatory_report, fincen_bsa, ofac_check

### Payments (5 types)
swift_mt103, pain001, nacha_ach, sepa_mandate, fedwire

### Crypto and Blockchain (16 types)
btc_address, eth_address, crypto_address, tx_hash, block_hash, mnemonic, private_key, public_key, contract_address, nft_token_id, defi_pool_id, gas_price, gas_limit, block_number, wallet_balance

### Health (12 types)
bloodtype, icd10, bmi, height, weight, heart_rate, blood_pressure, glucose_level, cholesterol, medication_name, dosage, lab_result

### Security and PenTest (14 types)
cef_log, x509_cert, pcap_hex, password, password_hash, cve_id, api_key, jwt_token, oauth_token, session_id, csrf_token, hmac_signature, jwt_attack, asn1_fuzz

### Barcode and Product (6 types)
ean13, ean8, upca, isbn13, isbn10, gs1_128

### Telecom (5 types)
imei, iccid, imsi, msisdn, phone

### Contact and Location (15 types)
phone, address_city, address_street, address_full, postal_code, latitude, longitude, timezone, country_code, coordinates, email, username, firstname, lastname, fullname

### Datetime (8 types)
past_date, future_date, date_between, date_this_year, date_this_month, time_only, datetime_iso, unix_timestamp

### Meta and UUID (25 types)
uuid, requestid, correlationid, sessionid, idempotencykey, traceid, spanid, reverse_regex, hash_md5, hash_sha256, hash_sha512, base64, hex_string, semver, color_hex, color_rgb, locale_code, currency_code, country_iso2, country_iso3, language_code, mime_type, file_extension, user_agent, ip_address

### AI and ML (3 types)
ai_embedding, ai_vector, ai_sparse_vector

### IoT and Hardware (7 types)
mqtt_payload, lora_packet, nfc_uid, ndef_uri, rfid_uid, epc, can_frame

### Bank Statements (2 types)
mt940, camt053

### E-Invoice and EDI (4 types)
ubl_invoice, xmldsig, edi_850, edifact_orders

## Validation Standards

All generated values comply with official specifications:
- IBAN: ISO 13616, MOD-97 checksum
- BIC/SWIFT: ISO 9362
- Credit cards: Luhn algorithm
- ISIN: ISO 6166 with CUSIP checksum
- LEI: ISO 17442
- TCKN: Turkish Republic citizen ID algorithm
- MRZ: ICAO Doc 9303
- EAN/UPC: GS1 checksum
- IMEI: Luhn algorithm
- SSN: SSA area-group-serial format
- NIN: UK National Insurance format
